title: JSON Parser
description: Build a parser that can handle a subset of JSON: strings, numbers, booleans, null, arrays, and objects. Parse JSON text into a Rust enum representing JSON values.
requirements: Define a JsonValue enum with variants for String, Number, Bool, Null, Array, and Object
Parse JSON strings (handle basic escape sequences)
Return meaningful error messages on invalid input
hints: Use a Peekable iterator or track position in a Vec<char> for lookahead
Match on the first character to decide which parse method to call
Recursion naturally handles nested arrays and objects
An enum with variants for each JSON type maps perfectly to Rust's type system
bonusChallenge: Add support for unicode escape sequences (\uXXXX). Implement a pretty-printer that converts JsonValue back to formatted JSON text.
